description: 중요도별 기한 초과 미조치 부적합 목록 (critical=3일, high=7일, medium=14일, low=30일) — importance 파라미터로 필터 가능
name: nc_overdue
sql: SELECT r.id, r.importance, r.title, p.name AS project_name, CONCAT(u.last_name, u.first_name) AS reporter, am.username AS action_manager_username, CONCAT(am.last_name, am.first_name) AS action_manager_name, (r.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::text AS created_kst, EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - r.created_at)::int - CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 3 WHEN 'high' THEN 7 WHEN 'medium' THEN 14 WHEN 'low' THEN 30 ELSE 14 END AS overdue_days FROM api_nonconformancereport r LEFT JOIN api_project p ON p.id = r.project_id LEFT JOIN auth_user u ON u.id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN auth_user am ON am.id = r.action_manager_id WHERE (r.action_result IS NULL OR r.action_result = '') AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - r.created_at) > CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 3 WHEN 'high' THEN 7 WHEN 'medium' THEN 14 WHEN 'low' THEN 30 ELSE 14 END AND ('{importance}' = 'all' OR r.importance = '{importance}') ORDER BY CASE r.importance WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, r.created_at ASC
